name: Luxury Silk Caramel Blazer Dress
description: A sophisticated caramel blazer dress crafted from premium silk blend. Features a tailored fit & flare silhouette for a professional yet elegant look. Perfect for gala events.

name: Midnight Lavender Velvet Blazer
description: Exquisite lavender velvet blazer dress. Simple yet striking, it offers a luxurious feel with its premium ponte lining. Ideal for evening receptions.

name: Onyx Professional Executive Dress
description: Command respect in this onyx professional dress. Crafted from heavy taffeta for a structured, commanding silhouette. A staple for any modern wardrobe.

name: Vibrant Magenta Couture Blazer
description: Statement magenta couture blazer dress. Premium organza overlay gives it a unique texture and wrap silhouette that flatters every curve.

name: Shadow Black Buttoned Gala Blazer
description: Sleek shadow black blazer dress with decorative gold buttons. The elastane mix ensures a perfect column fit for any high-profile event.

name: Empire Magenta Power Shift
description: Modern magenta shift dress. Loose and comfortable without sacrificing style. A versatile piece that transitions from day to night effortlessly.

name: Sun-Kissed Yellow Silk Pencil
description: Radiant yellow pencil dress in a light-catching jacquard. Features a classic A-line flare that's both flattering and fun. Perfect for summer weddings.

name: Royal Navy Executive Pencil
description: Establish your authority in this royal navy georgette pencil dress. Modern cut with a regular silhouette for maximum comfort during long boardroom meetings.

name: Emerald Garden Flared Pencil
description: Deep emerald flared pencil dress. Organza fabric adds a touch of mystery and grace. A high-fashion choice for spring garden parties.

name: High-Fashion Ivory Evening Dress
description: Avant-garde ivory evening dress. This ultra-modern piece features a structured silhouette that stands out in any crowd. A true designer masterpiece.

name: Amber Grace A-Line Pencil
description: Warm amber tones meet a classic flared pencil silhouette. Wool fabric provides warmth and structure, making it ideal for brisk mornings.

name: Chic Monochrome Striped Pencil
description: Bold monochrome stripes define this ultra-modern shift dress. Lightweight ponte fabric ensures breathability for all-day wear.

name: Deep Plum Velour Sheath
description: Lush plum velour sheath dress. The balloon fit adds a contemporary edge to a classic material. Perfect for cool-weather social gatherings.

name: Rustic Sunset Empire Midi
description: Empire waist midi dress in a rich rust shade. Versatile enough for office wear or weekend outings. Elegant and understated.

name: Dusty Rose Evening Sheath

name: Asymmetric Red Silk Evening
